title: Exclude Deleted Tickets from Filter Counts

posts.author: rosascbhhomes (Rosa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Right now, filters only apply to created tickets. We can track new and completed tickets for the week, but tickets that are created and then deleted are still being counted. It would be helpful to have a feature that excludes deleted tickets from the filter count.

What are you trying to achieve

Accurate weekly ticket reporting that reflects active and completed tickets without counting deleted ones. Just an overall cleaner ticket metric so team can measure workload and performance.
